title: The Old Lady Flies
description: In the fading glow of barnstorming’s golden age, Russ Healy refuses to abandon the battered Jenny that carried him through war’s aftermath and the perilous thrills of a traveling flying circus. When hard times force the outfit to ground its oldest plane, Russ chooses loyalty over profit—and pride over prudence. As tempers flare and a dangerous movie stunt beckons, the sky becomes a proving ground for devotion, daring, and the cost of sticking to one’s guns. Set against the raw spectacle of early aviation, this high-flying tale captures the grit, camaraderie, and recklessness of pilots who lived by lift and nerve.
